fields.admin_requirements: Admins can enable NFC login visibility from Suite Features without requiring detected RFID scanner hardware.
fields.public_requirements: When enabled, login page can expose RFID login CTA on NFC-capable browsers even without scanner feature detection.
fields.service_requirements: Relies on browser Web NFC support for client-side availability.
fields.summary: Controls NFC-first RFID login entry visibility on the public login page.
